'''Caursito''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]<ref name="EAOC" /> that [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mavron]] stopped at to pick up a copy of the [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]] on his way back to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
